name: RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BUG-21
title: resolve-scope.py prompt hardcodes feature names contract and rabbit-cage
description: resolve-scope.py lines 78-79 hard-code rules referencing specific features 'contract' and 'rabbit-cage'. This violates the spec's stated purpose: 'General-purpose shared skill - no assumptions about callers' and 'Makes no assumptions about callers or use cases'. If those features are renamed or removed, the prompt becomes incorrect. The rules should be data-driven (extracted from feature summaries or removed entirely so the Agent decides based solely on feature descriptions).

history.note: Fixed in Wave 3 PR. BUG-21 hardcoded names removed; BUG-28 defensive .get() for optional keys; BUG-7/9/12/14/17 covered by new test-invariant-coverage.py.
